reference: Hello, I am seventeen and I have a slight problem. I can't stop masturbating and there is a little piece of skin under my penis. When I pull down the skin, it hurts very badly, and I am also very scared to talk about it to my dad. Can you please give me tips about it?
text: Hello, I am seventeen and I have a slight problem. I am not masturbating, but there is a little piece of skin under my penis, and I pull down the skin. It hurts very bad, and I am also very scared to talk about it with dad. Can you please give me tips about it?
